overrides.expect: \operatorname{csgn} [ x ] = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 + j, & \text {if \mathbf {R e} (x) > 0 and \operatorname{Im} (x) > 0} \\ 1 - j, & \text {if \mathbf {R e} (x) > 0 and \operatorname{Im} (x) <   0} \\ - 1 + j, & \text {if \mathbf {R e} (x) <   0 and \operatorname{Im} (x) > 0} \\ - 1 - j, & \text {if \mathbf {R e} (x) <   0 and \operatorname{Im} (x) <   0} \end{array} \right.
